title: A lack of compliance demand weighs on Aus carbon credits
section_path: A lack of compliance demand weighs on Aus carbon credits
section_path_text: A lack of compliance demand weighs on Aus carbon credits
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Uncertainty over monetary policy saw a mixed performance from commodity markets. Concerns over economic growth in China also weighed on sentiment. Image reference: 1699562648627.png | assets/2023-11-10_market-uncertainty-weighs-on-sentiment_img_1699562648627_57ea193f5e53.png
Gold rallied late in the session after dovish comments from the Fed.
